subcodes.first_line: The reality of Divinity, in all its meanings, cannot be encompassed within the bounds of human comprehension, for whatsoever is the product of minds and thoughts is limited [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حقيقت الوهيّت بتمام معانی ادراکش در حوصله انسانی نگنجد . زيرا آنچه نتائج عقول و افکار است محدود است
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @need for an educator, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @true liberty; freedom, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher
